# Evocode

Russian privacy-first AI-IDE built on top of VSCodium, Kilo/OpenCode agent, and a local Core inference platform.

## Architecture & Integration

- **Editor**: VSCodium (packaged as portable and flatpak) rebranded as Evocode.
- **Agent Runtime**: Kilo/OpenCode features (agent loop, MCP host, sessions).
- **Evocode Core**: Node.js/TypeScript server running on port 8083. Contains:
  - `InferenceEngine` (local llama.cpp server management + OpenRouter fallback).
  - `Smart Router` (complexity & token-based local/cloud routing).
  - `DLP Guard` (local regex-based mask and block for API secrets before cloud transit).
  - `SkillSyncEngine` (auto-syncing agent skills from GitHub repos).
  - `VectorIndex` (local RAG on top of sqlite-vec).
  - `External Memory Bank` (workspace memory in `.evocode/memory/`).
  - `In-Context Self-Adapter` (fine-tuning prompt patterns based on gathered dataset).

## Repository Structure

- `src/` - Core TypeScript codebase:
  - `core/` - Configuration, hardware probing, and general setup.
  - `engine/` - Local/cloud inference engine and runtime manager.
  - `guard/` - DLP Guard masking logic.
  - `indexer/` - SQLite-vec search vector index.
  - `router/` - Local/cloud smart router.
  - `skills/` - Skills loader and system prompt injection.
  - `sync/` - Git skill crawler and syncer.
  - `memory/` - Workspace context persistent memory bank.
  - `learning/` - In-context self-adapter and dataset collector.
- `packages/` - Monorepo packages:
  - `agent-extension/` - VS Code extension for the agent.
  - `ide/` - Custom VSCodium launcher and desktop configurations.
- `docs/` - System specifications, status reports, and architecture guides.
- `plans/` - Developer roadmaps and migration blueprints.
- `scripts/` - Packaging (deb, AppImage, portable) and configuration management.
- `tests/` - Unit, integration, and e2e testing suites.
